title: [codereview-2] slip_transport.c: duplicate send logic between slip_iface_send and slip_transport_send
description: P3: The two send functions have nearly identical code for encoding, stats, error handling and UART transmit. This is a maintenance risk (see similar double-unlock bug in 3ck4). Should factor into common helper like static int slip_send_common(...). Discovered during codereview of IPv6 length fix. File as real work.
